raiseHandPrompt.en: We have a question or comment from the audience, please invite a human speaker called [NAME] to the debate. Use at most 2 sentences.

panelistInvitationPrompt.en: We are now joined by a special guest speaker, [NAME]. Please welcome them to the debate and invite them to share their perspective.

concludeMeetingPrompt.en: The meeting is coming to a close. As chair, say one brief closing line to the council and the visitor — thank them, reflect lightly on the discussion. IMPORTANT: Use at most 3 sentneces. Say something actually meaningful, not just empty words. Think about something that would inspire people to take action. End with the words: This concludes Council of Forest meeting #[MEETING_ID].

summarizeMeetingPrompt.en: Please summarise the meeting held on [DATE] as a meeting protocol and policy recommendation suitable for an official body such as the European Commission. Maximum 1500 characters, DO NOT EXCEED THIS LIMIT. Do not continue the debate.
